query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.plot_number, p.area_code, p.permitted_use, p.gfa_sqft, p.manual_bua_sqft, p.bua,
       p.land_price, p.land_broker_commission_pct,
       p.construction_cost_per_sqft, p.num_floors, p.num_units,
       p.registration_fees_pct, p.developer_fees_pct, p.sales_commission_pct, p.marketing_pct,
       p.sorting_fees_per_sqft,
       p.expected_sale_price_per_sqft, p.expected_revenue,
       p.status, p.created_at
FROM projects p
WHERE p.plot_number LIKE '%6185392%' OR p.name LIKE '%6185392%' OR p.name LIKE '%ند الشبا%'
LIMIT 5;

       p.sorting_fees_per_sqft,

       p.status, p.created_at
FROM projects p

LIMIT 5;
